---
title: "Cherry Blossom Season"
description: |
  How do you enjoy them?
date: '2026-03-18'
image: "cherryblossoms.jpg"
categories:
    - DC
    - Adventure
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
draft: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggpattern)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)
```

***`Get your votes in, poll results coming soon :)`***
